title: Tome X Act 2: The Mage Takes a Face

story.text:
# 📖 Tome X Act 2: The Mage Takes a Face
**act** · shared · narrative

Continues Tome X — The Hearth. Since Act 1 the cousin-forge built three things: the Warden gained memory (Recall — private local RAG over the vault), the Mage a public face (the Knowledge Portal — public Mage ⊥ private Warden, the pattern scaled to a guild, with its two invariants), and the step-up ladder was made whole (A2 Sovereign co-sign + the out-of-band factor-2 Warden→Signet channel). Deepens C94–C96; mints no new conjecture. v0.11.0 · 19/19 e2e.
> *The hold learned to remember, and opened a window that keeps its secrets.*
